    Supports date range filtering and pagination.

commit def4567abc1234567890abcdef1234567890abcd
Author: Dev User <dev@example.com>
Date:   Mon Jan 20 09:15:00 2025 +0000

    fix: resolve null pointer in data parser

    The parser crashed when input contained empty lines.
    Added guard clause and unit test for empty input case.
